design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate maze, consume all pellets while avoiding ghost enemies; use power pellets to temporarily reverse threat and score bonus points
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Spatial navigation under pursuit pressure; ghost behavior unpredictability prevents rote memorization of safe patterns
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Empowered maze navigation with tactical reversal moments; female protagonist agency in traditionally male arcade space
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Deliberately designed to break the pattern-memorization solutions that dominated original Pac-Man via semi-random ghost movement (especially Blinky and Pinky); four distinct mazes with varied warp tunnel configurations force adaptive rather than scripted play; fruit bounce mechanics add environmental unpredictability

difficulty.lives_system: Multiple lives system; contact with ghost causes loss of life; game ends when all lives exhausted
difficulty.checkpointing: Between-level intermissions serve as soft checkpoints; progress resets on game over
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Difficulty escalates systematically: ghost speed increases per level, power pellet invulnerability duration decreases and eventually stops entirely, preventing reliance on single strategy; semi-random ghost patterns prevent pre-planned safe routes

progression.unlock_mechanism: Maze variants unlock via progression (pink maze levels 1-2, light blue 3-5, brown 6-9, dark blue 10+); bonus fruits change per level; difficulty curve through ghost speed and power pellet effectiveness reduction
replayability_hooks: Four distinct maze configurations with different visual themes and warp tunnel layouts
Semi-random ghost AI prevents pattern memorization, enabling varied playthroughs
Intermissions advance narrative (relationship development between Pac-Man and Ms. Pac-Man), providing motivational story progression
Escalating difficulty curve encourages high-score chasing and skill improvement
Rotating fruit bonuses (8+ rounds feature random fruit sequences) add unpredictability to scoring strategies

world_building_techniques: Intermission sequences depicting relationship progression (meeting, romance, parenthood)
Female protagonist establishes character identity distinct from original Pac-Man
Visual maze theming (color-coded progression) provides subtle world evolution

faction_indicators: Ghosts (Blinky, Pinky, Inky, Sue) as persistent adversarial faction with distinct behavioral signatures
Ms. Pac-Man as female player-character representing alternative protagonist identity
danger_signals: Speed increases signaling escalating threat level
Power pellet depletion indicating loss of temporary defensive advantage
environmental_storytelling: Four maze variants with distinct color palettes signal progression and world expansion
Warp tunnel mechanics create strategic environmental shortcuts that ghost behavior exploits
Fruit bounce physics demonstrate dynamic environmental systems beyond static maze walls

sources_used: wikipedia - Ms. Pac-Man gameplay mechanics, ghost behavior differences, maze variants, difficulty progression, intermission narrative
